README.md.general_idea: Update the documented Java version requirement from 17 to 21 to reflect the migration target.
Add Docker to the list of prerequisites, likely required for running containerized services in the tutorial steps.
Replace generic build/test/run commands with specific Maven commands targeting individual module pom.xml files.
Significantly expand the list of tutorial steps to include more modules like logging, security, and messaging.
Rename tutorial step identifiers to match new directory structures or naming conventions (e.g., log4j2, artemis).
Add a high-level description of Spring Boot and a link to the project generator at the top of the README.
README.md.human_impl: +Spring Boot is an agile framework to use modules of Spring framework in fast and easy configuration way.
